---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.1.0`](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.0.2...v2.1.0)

##### Changes

-   Support `--net=none` ([#​430](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/430), thanks to [@​antrusd](https://togithub.com/antrusd))
-   Support systemd socket activation ([#​429](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/429), thanks to [@​charliemirabile](https://togithub.com/charliemirabile))

Full changes: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/8?closed=1

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/8841780701
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is dc49dda422704b6b9fc6e2bc7fcdf436f437fc98fa0ff1bcdcc38687954baadd .

</details>
